description:
Move design comment blocks from prompt files into standalone docs.

Extract from prompts:
- docs/design-prime.md — from prompts/prime.md lines 1-67 (13 design requirements)
- docs/design-start.md — from prompts/start.md lines 1-32 (7 design requirements)
- docs/design-agents.md — from prompts/agents.md lines 1-40 (7 design requirements)

New docs:
- docs/design-output.md — markdown-native output architecture, tokenized rendering, token vocabulary, ResolveMarkdown/ResolveTTY pipeline, emit() pattern, --raw flag, testing strategy
- docs/design-templates.md — Go text/template system, {{ bw }} function, available data per prompt, how to add new template functions

Replace comment blocks in prompt files with one-line reference: {{/* See docs/design-prime.md */}}

Files: docs/design-*.md (5 new), prompts/prime.md, prompts/start.md, prompts/agents.md
title: Extract design docs to docs/
